# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change clearly.

## Why it matters

Explain the practical value for the discoverability framework.

## Scope

- [ ] English docs updated
- [ ] Russian docs updated
- [ ] Checklists or templates updated
- [ ] Scripts validated locally

## Validation

Describe what you checked.

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Page intent is fully covered.
- [ ] Title, meta, and H1/H2 structure reviewed.
- [ ] Schema.org validated where applicable.
- [ ] Analytics events configured and tested.
- [ ] Internal links added or updated.
- [ ] AI/GEO checks (`llms.txt` / AI bots accessibility) done where applicable.

See [docs/en/21-definition-of-done.md](../docs/en/21-definition-of-done.md)
and [docs/ru/21-definition-of-done.md](../docs/ru/21-definition-of-done.md)
for the full checklist.
